nasb.text: Some of the people therefore, when they heard these words, were saying, “This certainly is the Prophet.”

esv.text: When they heard these words, some of the people said, “This really is the Prophet.”

cnv.text: 群眾中有人聽了這些話，就說：“這真是‘那位先知’！”

ccb.text: 听见这些话后，有些人说：“祂真是那位先知。”

csbs.text: 众人听了这话，有些人说：“这个人确实是那位先知！”
